name: migration: rule lacking provenance[].source is rejected — cannot determine target namespace
command:
mkdir -p rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    name: x
    description: x
    detector: x
    provenance: []
' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree"
